/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/dijkstra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/tradeoff_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/json_exporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fuel_planner.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o fuel_planner
